title: Tangy Fermented American Corn Tacos
description: A unique fusion of American and Mexican cuisine, featuring a tangy fermented slaw, crispy corn tortillas, and a hint of blue food colouring to add a pop of colour.

ingredients.name: Fermented Corn Slaw (see notes)
ingredients.notes: Use store-bought or make your own by fermenting corn, onion, and carrot in a brine solution for 24 hours.

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the soffritto base and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, chili powder, and salt, and cook for an additional minute.
Add the dairy-free yogurt and stir to combine.
Add the fermented corn slaw and stir to combine.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the slaw mixture onto a warmed tortilla and garnishing with fresh cilantro.
Note: If using store-bought fermented corn slaw, follow the package instructions for reheating.
